sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55736" key="kateisa/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατεισ-άγω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰγ]</pron>, <sense id="n55736.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">display to one's own loss</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μωρίαν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.91</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
